sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '听' (listen) changes the structure of the question from 'why don't you listen well' to 'why do you listen or not listen to me', altering the meaning of the sentence.
Substituting '好' (well) with '我' (me) changes the object of the sentence, shifting the meaning from 'listen well' to 'listen to me', which significantly alters the intent.
